历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were approximately 10405 → 13380 → 7458 → 5931 → 5982, showing a fluctuating but generally advancing trend. After a significant advance to 7458 in 2023, it further advanced to 5931 in 2024, and remained basically stable at 5982 in 2025, with rankings stabilizing around 6000 in recent two years. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangxi: 51 in 2021, 53 in 2022, 52 in 2023, 55 in 2024, 56 in 2025, showing a slight annual increase. The 2026 plan is 51, a decrease of 5 from 2025, a reduction of about 8.9%, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Engineering University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Rankings have been steadily rising: 50th in 2021 → 53rd in 2022 → 49th in 2023 → 45th in 2024 → 43rd in 2025 → 43rd in 2026, firmly in the top 50 nationally, with steadily improving strength and recognition. The university has no negative public opinion records in reputation evaluation documents from 2021 to 2026, maintaining a stable and positive reputation. Its Douyin popularity ranks 27th (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of about 1.717 million. Main content includes introductions to flagship majors such as Underwater Acoustics Engineering and Nuclear Engineering, as well as the "National Defense Seven Sons" label, attracting high application attention. There are no records of enrollment gaps in the university's abnormal admission files. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Control Science and Engineering was rated A, the only A-level discipline at this university. Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Underwater Acoustics Engineering, and Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology are top-tier specialized majors in the industry, holding an irreplaceable position in the national defense technology field.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, aligning well with the university's advantageous engineering directions. The total number of Guangxi Gaokao examinees in 2026 is about 392,000, an increase of about 3.3% from the combined total of about 379,600 for Physics and History Categories in 2025, slightly intensifying competition. The university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, in the Northeast region. Its enrollment proportion in Guangxi is about 2.2%–2.4%, a medium scale for cross-provincial enrollment. Guangxi examinees have stable recognition of strong engineering universities in the Northeast, with no significant changes in regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 5982, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 5 (alleviating competition), the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings (increasing attractiveness), relatively hot Douyin popularity (rising attention), and the growth in total Guangxi examinees (intensifying competition), and taking into account the competitive pressure from the increase in examinee numbers, a slight upward adjustment is made. The predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 5682, with a range of 5182–6182.

Examinees with rankings significantly better than the lower bound (within 5182) can focus on Tier 1. Examinees with rankings near the upper bound (around 6182) are advised to mainly use Tier 3 as safety options.
